mapper.select: SELECT U.MEM_ID, U.MEM_PASS, U.MEM_NAME, U.JOB_GRADE, U.DEPT_CODE, D.DEPT_NAME, U.CO_CODE, U.USE_YN FROM TBL_USER_MASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPT_MASTER D ON U.DEPT_CODE = D.DEPT_CODE WHERE U.MEM_ID = #{memId} AND U.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_MASTER ( MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, MEM_PASS, DEPT_CODE, CO_CODE, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{memId}, #{memName}, #{memPass}, #{deptCode}, #{coCode}, 'Y' )
